Get in touch — the SOT community is ready to help

Contact the SOT

The Ship Observations Team is a community of national meteorological services, programme managers, Port Meteorological Officers, scientists, and technical experts spread across more than 50 countries. Whether you are a shipping company exploring how to join the VOS Scheme, an officer with an instrument question at sea, a researcher needing data access information, or a national service looking to expand its programme — there is a contact in the SOT community who can help.

For general enquiries about the Ship Observations Team, its programmes, or how to participate, please contact the SOT Executive Board members at sot_eb[at]group.wmo.int.

For programme-specific enquiries:

Inquiries related to: Contact

Data transmission, GTS and WIS2.0

  • WIS2 implementation questions: wis2-support[at]wmo.int
  • WIS Secretariat Contacts

For urgent operational issues, please email the SOT Executive Board members at
sot_eb[at]group.wmo.int
with a copy your National Meteorological Service focal point.

Related articles

About the SOT

The Ship Observations Team coordinates global ship-based ocean and atmospheric observations — sustaining a record that has served science, safety, and climate understanding for more than 170 years.

© 2026 Ship Observation Team (SOT)
